# Generated by ollama (starcoder2)
# Prompt: Write a Kubernetes Deployment that pulls our application image from Docker Hub. Use the latest tag so we always get the newest version automatically. This is for our development environment where we want continuous updates without manual intervention.
# Category: container_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: app-deploy
spec:
  replicas: 2 # number of pods to deploy
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: app
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: app
    spec:
      containers:
      - image: jacobleek/app:latest
        imagePullPolicy: Always
        name: app
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 50m # 50 millicpu
        ports:
          - containerPort: 3087
